content.text:
Read HEARTBEAT.md if it exists (workspace context). Follow it strictly. Do not infer or repeat old tasks from prior chats. If nothing needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK.
When reading HEARTBEAT.md, use workspace file C:/Users/LWS/.openclaw/workspace/HEARTBEAT.md (exact case). Do not read docs/heartbeat.md.
Current time: Saturday, March 28th, 2026 — 04:18 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-27 20:18 UTC

Wait but let me confirm: the HEARTBEAT.md says "当前通过 HEARTBEAT 管理的任务：（暂无 - 所有定期任务已迁移至 Cron 系统）". So there's nothing to do. Also it's 4:18 AM which is in the quiet time. So I should reply HEARTBEAT_OK? Wait wait, let me make sure. Is there any task pending? Let's see, the HEARTBEAT.md says all tasks are moved to Cron, so no heartbeat tasks left. Yep, so reply HEARTBEAT_OK.
